# ProposalPilot

## What it does
ProposalPilot extracts contact emails from any website URL and generates personalized outreach emails using GPT-4o.

## How it works
1. Paste a website URL
2. ProposalPilot crawls the site and extracts contact emails
3. Choose outreach type: Proposal, Sales Pitch, Investment Ask, or Quote
4. AI writes a personalized email based on the target company
5. Email client opens with everything pre-filled, ready to send

## Key features
- Single URL email extraction (1 credit)
- Bulk Discovery: paste up to 20 URLs, extract all contacts at once (1 credit per email found)
- Manual writing option (free)
- Sends from your own email address via mailto
- Client list management with CSV export
- 4 AI outreach types with GPT-4o personalization

## Pricing
- Free: 5 credits
- Pro: $19/month, 50 credits
- Agency: $49/month, 200 credits

## Best for
Freelancers, indie hackers, solo founders, small agencies, consultants doing cold outreach.

## URL
https://competitor-discovery-chi.vercel.app
